Data Scientist.description: Uses data analysis, statistics, and machine learning to solve business problems and generate actionable insights.

Data Analyst.description: Transforms raw data into meaningful reports, dashboards, and business insights.

AI/ML Engineer.description: Designs, trains, and deploys intelligent systems powered by machine learning and artificial intelligence.

Frontend Developer.description: Builds modern, responsive, and user-friendly interfaces for websites and web applications.

Backend Developer.description: Develops APIs, databases, and server-side systems that power modern applications.

Full Stack Developer.description: Works across both frontend and backend technologies to create complete software solutions.

Cybersecurity Analyst.description: Protects systems, networks, and data from cyber threats, attacks, and vulnerabilities.

Cloud Engineer.description: Designs, deploys, and manages cloud infrastructure and scalable computing environments.

DevOps Engineer.description: Automates software delivery, infrastructure management, and deployment pipelines.

Mobile App Developer.description: Develops Android and iOS applications that deliver seamless mobile experiences.

UI/UX Designer.description: Designs intuitive user experiences and visually appealing digital interfaces.

QA Engineer.description: Ensures software quality through testing, automation, defect tracking, and quality assurance processes.
